examples: Compared with its ultramodern counterparts in Europe and Japan, Amtrak is not a font of innovation.
Shanghai is the largest business center in all of China, and its ultramodern cityscape is a sight to behold.
Morimoto is an ultramodern, stylishly appointed Japanese hit situated by Manhattan's instantly trendy High Line.
Audiences responded to its cool, ultramodern style while rooting for its heroes, whose only reliable power was their old-fashioned humanity.
